title: Might not be the best idea to shoot down UFOs! What do you think? 🤔
summary: A short clip discussing the potential dangers of attempting to shoot down UFOs, referencing the Tic Tac incident's superior performance capabilities and historical Russian incidents where pilots were allegedly killed after engaging UFOs.

key_claims.claim: US aircraft could not have shot down the Tic Tac UFO due to its superior performance capabilities
45 different incidents occurred where Russian warplanes chased UFOs and couldn't catch them
In three instances UFOs shot down Russian aircraft, resulting in two pilot deaths
After the Russian pilot deaths, orders were issued not to engage with UFOs
